song.title: Deck The Halls
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D Bm Deck the halls with boughs of holly .A7 D D A D Fa la la la la, la la la la .D Bm ‘Tis the season to be jolly, .A7 D D A D Fa la la la la, la la la la .A7 D Don we now our gay apparel, .D Bm A E7 A Fa la la, Fa la la, la la la .D Bm Troll the ancient Yuletide carol, .G D D A7 D Fa la la la la, la la la la
[V2] See the blazing Yule before us, |Fa ... Strike the harp and join the chorus, |Fa ... Follow me in merry measure, |Fa ... While I tell the Yuletide treasure, |Fa ...
[V3] Fast away the old year passes, |Fa ... Hail the new, ye lads and lasses, |Fa ... Sing we joyous all together, |Fa ... Heedless of the wind and weather, |Fa ...
